_template.name: FluxNova: Flash Risk Management
_template.description: Real-time flash risk management blueprint with on-premise and cloud compute, aggregation, and auto-provisioning for latency-sensitive financial risk calculations
_template.author: CalmStudio Contributors

nodes.name: FluxNova Platform
nodes.description: Full FluxNova BPM platform deployment hosting the flash risk orchestration process

nodes.name: FluxNova BPM Engine
nodes.description: Core BPMN 2.0 / DMN 1.3 engine orchestrating the flash risk calculation workflow, dispatching tasks to on-premise and cloud compute nodes

audit-logging.description: All risk calculation dispatches, results, and exceptions are recorded in an immutable audit log

nodes.name: FluxNova REST API
nodes.description: RESTful API layer providing endpoints for risk process deployment, external task worker integration, and risk result retrieval

nodes.name: FluxNova Cockpit
nodes.description: Process monitoring dashboard providing real-time visibility into risk calculation instances, incidents, and batch operations

nodes.name: FluxNova Admin
nodes.description: Management console for user, group, and tenant administration for the risk management platform

nodes.name: FluxNova Tasklist
nodes.description: Task assignment UI for human review and exception handling in risk calculation workflows

nodes.name: Process Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing risk process definitions, runtime state, history, and audit logs

nodes.name: On-Premise Risk Engine
nodes.description: On-premise risk computation engine for latency-sensitive calculations requiring sub-millisecond response times and access to co-located market data feeds

data-classification.description: Risk computation results are classified Confidential — position data, P&L, and risk factors must not leave the secure perimeter

nodes.name: Cloud Risk Engine
nodes.description: Cloud-based risk computation engine for burst capacity scaling during high-volatility market events when on-premise capacity is exhausted

data-classification.description: Cloud risk computations handle Confidential position data — encryption in transit and at rest is mandatory

encryption-in-transit.description: All position data sent to cloud compute is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 minimum

nodes.name: Risk Aggregation Service
nodes.description: Aggregates risk results from on-premise and cloud compute nodes, merges partial risk vectors, and produces consolidated real-time risk reports

nodes.name: Cloud Provisioner
nodes.description: Auto-provisions cloud compute instances based on market volatility signals, scaling out when VIX or realized volatility exceeds configured thresholds

relationships.description: Engine persists risk process state, history, and audit data to the process database
REST API delegates all requests to the embedded engine via internal Java API calls
Cockpit queries risk process instances and incidents via the REST API
Admin manages users, authorizations, and risk platform configuration via the REST API
Tasklist retrieves and completes human exception-handling tasks via the REST API
FluxNova platform contains the BPM engine
FluxNova platform contains the REST API
FluxNova platform contains the Cockpit monitoring app
FluxNova platform contains the Admin management app
FluxNova platform contains the Tasklist app
FluxNova platform contains the process database
Engine dispatches risk calculation tasks to the on-premise compute engine for low-latency position risk calculations
Engine dispatches burst risk calculation tasks to the cloud compute engine when on-premise capacity is exceeded
On-premise compute pushes partial risk vectors to the aggregation service for consolidation
Cloud compute pushes burst risk results to the aggregation service for consolidation
Provisioner scales cloud compute instances up or down based on real-time volatility signals
Engine signals the provisioner to scale cloud capacity when market volatility triggers burst mode
